features.title: Harness refresh and execution tracking
acceptance_criteria: Feature backlog reflects the full supplier onboarding rehaul scope
claude-progress.md tracks active feature ids, blockers, and exact next step
Each completed feature records concrete verification steps and outcomes
features.notes: Backlog refreshed and maintained during implementation.

features.title: Configurable document catalog (DB-backed) with EN/ES labels and templates metadata
acceptance_criteria: Document definitions are stored and managed from supplier config store (in-memory + Postgres)
Seed includes docx-based defaults (including FIN-01 and TAX-02) with EN/ES labels
Requirement preview rows resolve from config store instead of static-only catalog
features.notes: Shared/domain+schema and supplier config store now support DB-backed document definitions with EN/ES labels and template path metadata.

features.title: Portal Settings document catalog management and template upload
acceptance_criteria: Portal Settings exposes CRUD-style controls for document definitions
Admin can upload/remove one template file per document
Requirement matrix UI uses configured document labels and no static duplication
features.notes: Portal Settings includes document definition create/update/status and template upload/download/clear controls.

features.title: Supplier form address and bank details rehaul
acceptance_criteria: Supplier address input is split into street/city/postal code/country
Bank UI hides SAP-only validity fields and keeps IBAN/account-number behavior
Underlying DB model remains compatible and retains SAP fields
features.notes: Supplier onboarding captures street/city/postal code/country and simplified bank fields while retaining SAP compatibility in model.

features.title: Supplier documentation UX on right-side accordion with template download
acceptance_criteria: Bottom required documentation block is removed
Right panel has single-open accordion per required document
Each accordion entry allows template download and document upload
features.notes: Supplier portal now uses a right-side single-open documentation accordion with per-requirement template download and upload.

features.title: Supplier resume via draft autosave
acceptance_criteria: Supplier progress is saved server-side before final submit
Reloading supplier link restores entered address/bank values and uploaded docs
Supplier portal shows resume-safe messaging
features.notes: Supplier draft save API and resumable form state implemented; uploaded docs are preserved server-side.

features.title: Supplier token hardening with Magic Link + OTP
acceptance_criteria: Supplier link requires OTP verification before onboarding form access
OTP flow enforces expiration and attempt limits
Supplier session cookie gates upload/draft/submit operations
features.notes: OTP request/verify flow implemented with supplier session cookie gate for supplier draft/upload/template/submit operations.

features.title: Localization and regression coverage for new supplier/admin flows
acceptance_criteria: All new UI strings exist in EN and ES (except requirement matrix enum values that are intentionally left)
Automated tests cover catalog, OTP, resume, and supplier submission happy path
No regressions on existing dashboard/case workflows
features.notes: EN/ES keys added for new flows and full Playwright e2e suite now passes (16 tests).

features.title: Container rebuild and final verification closure
acceptance_criteria: Containers are rebuilt and force recreated after repository changes
Portal is reachable and key flows smoke-tested
Tracking artifacts updated with final outcomes
features.notes: Containers rebuilt/recreated; runtime services healthy; portal login endpoint reachable.

features.title: Supplier template visibility and autosave UX hardening
acceptance_criteria: Supplier requirement accordion shows template download link only when template exists
Supplier submission CTA label is `Submit Response` and includes an icon
Supplier form uses autosave feedback indicator without manual save button
E2E coverage validates template available/unavailable behavior and autosave flow
features.notes: Supplier portal now exposes configured template downloads, keeps non-template requirements clearly labeled, and shows autosave status with translated EN/ES copy.
